repair_options.description: Replace strcpy with strncpy and add null termination

code_changes.explanation: Use bounded string copy with explicit null termination

validation_tests: Test with input longer than buffer size
Test with exact buffer size input

repair_options.description: Add comprehensive input validation and safe string handling

code_changes.explanation: Add input length validation and use safe string functions

repair_options.description: Set pointer to NULL after free to prevent use-after-free

code_changes.explanation: Add null check and nullify pointer after free

validation_tests: Test cleanup with valid session data
Test cleanup with already freed data

repair_options.description: Reorder operations to check before freeing

code_changes.explanation: Check and use data before freeing, then nullify pointer

repair_recommendations.title: High Severity Format String in log_error()

repair_options.description: Use safe format string with %s specifier

code_changes.explanation: Use explicit format specifier to prevent format string attacks

validation_tests: Test with format specifiers in message (%s, %d, %n)

repair_recommendations.title: Medium Severity Integer Overflow in allocate_buffer()

code_changes.original_code: size_t total = count * item_size; // Potential overflow
code_changes.explanation: Check for potential overflow before performing multiplication

validation_tests: Test with values that would cause overflow

repair_recommendations.title: Medium Severity Null Pointer Dereference in process_request()
repair_recommendations.repair_not_available_reason: Requires understanding of proper error handling semantics for this API

manual_repair_guidance.description: Add null pointer validation at function entry
manual_repair_guidance.suggested_approach: Determine appropriate error return value and add null check
considerations: What should the function return when request is NULL?
Should this log an error or fail silently?
Are there other parameters that also need validation?
